title: grants — authorization policies
description: One policy class with abilities that answer on both `sanctum` (tenant users managing grants in their own tenant) and `platform_admin` (Academorix ops cross-tenant audit-read + report generation) guards. Registered by GrantServiceProvider::registerPolicies(). Guard-aware — each ability checks the caller's guard and gates accordingly.

abilities.name: viewAny
abilities.description: List grants in the caller's tenant. Default scope: WHERE subject_id = auth_user (users see their own grants). Admins with grants.manage or grants.audit_any can pass filter[subject_id] to widen.

abilities.name: view
requires: grants.viewAny AND (grant.tenant_id === auth_user.tenant_id) AND (grant.subject_id === auth_user.id OR caller.has('grants.audit_any') OR caller.has('grants.manage'))
abilities.description: Show a specific grant. Tenant-scoped + subject-scoped.

abilities.name: create
requires: grants.issue AND resource_type registered in GrantableRegistry AND caller can access the resource AND caller holds every permission being granted (privilege-escalation guard fires either way, but this shortens the loop)
abilities.description: Issue a new grant. The observer also enforces the guard — this policy is the first-line 401/403 filter. Cross-guard / cross-application / cross-tenant grants refused here + at the observer.

abilities.name: update
abilities.description: Patch a grant (expires_at + reason + metadata only). Immutable fields refused at the observer.

abilities.name: revoke
requires: (grants.manage AND grant.tenant_id === auth_user.tenant_id) OR (grants.revoke AND grant.granted_by === auth_user.id)
abilities.description: Revoke a grant. Admins with grants.manage can revoke any tenant grant; members with grants.revoke can revoke grants they issued. Refused for already-terminal grants.

abilities.name: revokeOwn
abilities.description: The narrow revocation ability — for members who need to unshare something they shared. Split from `revoke` to keep the policy self-documenting.

abilities.name: auditPrincipal
abilities.description: Enumerate grants for a specific subject. Users see their own; admins see anyone in the tenant.

abilities.name: auditResource
requires: grants.audit_any OR (caller owns / can view the resource + holds grants.viewAny)
abilities.description: Enumerate grants on a specific resource. Resource owners see grants on their resources; admins see any resource in the tenant.

abilities.name: bulkCreate
requires: grants.bulk_provision AND tenant entitled to `bulk_grant_provision` (medium plan+)
abilities.description: Upload a CSV of grants. Entitlement check runs alongside permission check.

abilities.name: issueDeny
abilities.description: Issue a grant with decision='deny'. Also fires the audit-critical GrantDenialIssued event immediately.

abilities.name: grantAcrossRole
requires: grants.grant_across_role AND tenant entitled to `cross_role_grants` (enterprise) AND a matching workflow/approvals template exists for the requested cross-role grant
abilities.description: Rare escape hatch — grantor grants a permission not in their own role via an approval flow. Refused without the approval-instance match.

abilities.name: viewAnyPlatform
abilities.description: Cross-tenant list for Academorix ops. Every list read captures the (platform_user_id, tenant_ids_touched, filters) tuple in the audit stream.

abilities.name: generateAuditReport
requires: platform.grants.audit_report AND platform_user holds an active compliance ticket / justification tag (captured in audit metadata)
abilities.description: Generate a cross-tenant compliance snapshot. The report generator refuses without a justification value in the request body; the value is captured verbatim in the audit trail.

notes: Every ability that mutates a grant records an audit trail entry (via HasAudit) + an activity_log row (via HasActivityLog). Refusal (Gate::denies) is ALSO audited under the `preflight_failed` event on the activity log — a denied create is a security signal.

Preflight validators supplied by grantable-registered consumers run BEFORE this policy — a consumer's Grantable-attribute-declared `preflight_validator` may refuse a grant before the policy is even consulted. Example: InvoiceGrantPreflight refuses grants on locked invoices.
